variants.title: Donaldson H000657 Pre-Cleaner Hood Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson H000657 Pre-Cleaner Hood Assembly is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Pre-Cleaner Hood Assembly, Outer Diameter: 280.9 mm, Length: 186.9 mm
